query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS translation_suggestions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  translationKey VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  namespace VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  sourceText TEXT NOT NULL,
  language VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  suggestedText TEXT NOT NULL,
  contributorId INT NOT NULL,
  contributorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reviewerId INT,
  reviewerComment TEXT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  votes INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS translation_suggestions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  translationKey VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  namespace VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  sourceText TEXT NOT NULL,
  language VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  suggestedText TEXT NOT NULL,
  contributorId INT NOT NULL,
  contributorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reviewerId INT,
  reviewerComment TEXT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  votes INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
